description_long: This is a modern tactical shotgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. It features a full-length Picatinny rail along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and a prominent pump-action foregrip beneath the barrel. The stock is solid and ergonomic, with a slight curve for shoulder support and a pistol grip for improved handling. The receiver is marked with white text, adding a touch of contrast to the otherwise dark exterior. The overall build appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a sturdy yet lightweight appearance. The shotgun is compact, making it suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A modern, matte black tactical shotgun with a full-length rail, pump-action foregrip, and ergonomic stock. Its compact, robust design is ideal for urban scenarios.
description_view_0: The shotgun is viewed directly from the front, showing the barrel opening and the symmetry of the foregrip and rail.
description_view_1: A clear side profile reveals the full-length rail, pump-action foregrip, pistol grip, and stock, as well as white receiver markings.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock's shape and the alignment of the rail and barrel, with minimal detail visible on the receiver.
description_view_3: The opposite side profile mirrors view 1, showing the rail, pump, and ergonomic features, but with different receiver markings visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a full-length vented rail on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated, rounded trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves
